title: Ravi Agrawal gets six-month extension as CBDT Chairman till December 31, 2026 - Details
description: The Appointments Committee of the Cabinet has approved Ravi Agrawal's re-appointment as CBDT Chairman for six months, from July 1 to December 31, 2026, on a contract basis.
content: The Appointments Committee of the Cabinet (ACC) has approved a six-month extension for Ravi Agrawal as Chairman of the Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT)."The Appointments Committee of the Cabinet has approved the re-appointment of Shri Ravi Agrawal as Chairman, Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT), on contract basis, for a period of six months with effect from 01.07.2026 till 31.12.2026, or until further orders, whichever is earlier, on the usual terms and conditions applicable to re-employed Central Government officers, in relaxation of the Recruitment Rules," read a statement by Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions Department of Personnel & Training.Ravi Agrawal was appointed as a member of the Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT) in July 2023 and took over as its Chairman in June 2024, succeeding Nitin Gupta. The CBDT is the apex policy-making body of the Income Tax Department and is headed by a chairman, with up to six members holding the rank of Special Secretary.Who is Ravi Agarwal?A 1988-batch Indian Revenue Service (IRS) officer, Agrawal was scheduled to retire on June 30, 2026. However, the latest government order extends his tenure, allowing him to continue leading the apex direct tax administration body beyond his retirement date.Agrawal has close to 38 years of public service experience, serving in diverse roles across taxation, e-governance, education, the environment, disinvestment, enforcement, and public policy. Out of his total service, about 29 years were with the Income Tax Department, and the rest were in other departments of the Government of India.Since July 2024, Agrawal has been the CBDT Chairman, heading India's direct tax administration under the Ministry of Finance and overseeing tax policy, legislative reforms, the functioning of the Income Tax Department, enforcement coordination, taxpayer services, digital transformation initiatives, and international tax cooperation.Throughout his career, Agrawal has consistently advocated using technology to modernise tax administration, while emphasising trust-based compliance and greater taxpayer participation as key pillars of effective governance.About CBDTThe CBDT is the apex body responsible for formulating direct tax policy and overseeing the administration of the Income Tax Department. Agrawal's tenure extension comes as the government continues to push reforms aimed at simplifying tax administration, improving voluntary compliance and strengthening revenue mobilisation.The Department of Personnel and Training (DoPT) has communicated the order to the Department of Revenue for necessary action.

title: Mahesh Dixit takes charge as new Intelligence Bureau chief
description:
New Delhi, Jun 30: Senior IPS officer Mahesh Dixit on Tuesday took charge as the new Director of the Intelligence Bureau (IB), succeeding Tapan Kumar Deka who retired after a four-year tenure.
Dixit, a 1993-batch Indian Police Service (IPS) officer from the Andhra Pradesh cadre (now serving Telangana), will head the premier internal intelligence agency for a two-year tenure.
His appointment was cleared last week by the Appointments Committee of the Cabinet (ACC), chaired by Prime Minister Narendra Modi.
Prior to his elevation, Dixit was serving as the Special Director in the IB, and was in-charge of counter-terror desk besides overseeing other departments of strategic importance.
A qualified medical doctor-turned-law enforcement professional, Dixit brings nearly three decades of extensive experience to the top post. Within the security establishment, he is widely recognised for his strong ground-level intelligence network and sharp counter-terrorism acumen.
Throughout his career, Dixit has managed diverse and sensitive portfolios, ranging from operations in the Northeast and Ladakh to handling anti-Naxal desks.
While serving in Telangana, his collaborative efforts with the state IB and state police were instrumental in building what is widely considered one of India's best counter-terrorism units, particularly at a time when Hyderabad had emerged as a key hub for pan-Islamic terrorist outfits, including the Indian Mujahideen and HUJI.
He also had a stint at the Indian mission in Moscow.
As the head of the Subsidiary Intelligence Bureau (SIB) in Srinagar, Dixit is credited by officials with playing a pivotal role in maintaining internal stability in Jammu and Kashmir following the abrogation of Article 370.
Last year, acting on an initial lead from the Srinagar police, he was instrumental in successfully busting a major "white-collar" terror network in the valley.
Dixit is considered in the intelligence fraternity as "finest mind" and is widely recognised within the security establishment for his measured approach to crisis management.
He was appreciated during his recent tenure in Jammu and Kashmir, where he handled most volatile security challenges during the post-Article 370 time during which he kept a tight vigil on separatist networks and monitoring shifting regional threats, while simultaneously fostering much-needed operational synergy among different wings of the security forces on the ground.
Dixit was also praised when climate activist Sonam Wangchuk launched high-profile protests in 2024 demanding full statehood and Sixth Schedule inclusion for the Ladakh region.
He was deeply involved behind the scenes, working to defuse tensions and facilitate a dialogue between the central government and Ladakhi leadership in Leh.
In recognition of his service, he has been highly decorated, receiving the President’s Police Medal for Distinguished Service, the Police Medal for Meritorious Service, and the Police Antrik Suraksha Seva Padak.
Dixit takes the reins of IB from 1988-batch Himachal Pradesh cadre IPS officer Tapan Kumar Deka, a legendary figure in India's intelligence fraternity who had exposed Pakistan's hand in 26/11 Mumbai attack and subsequently the identity of all 10 terrorists of banned Lashkar-e-Taiba.
He directed the National Security Guard commandoes during counter-attack in 26/11 Mumbai terror attacks.
First appointed as the IB chief in June 2022 for a two-year term, Deka was granted two subsequent service extensions by the government in 2024 and 2025 under public interest clauses.
Central rules permit the government to extend the services of high-profile chiefs—including those of the IB, RAW, cabinet secretary, and home secretary, beyond the standard superannuation age of 60.
Known across power corridors as an exceptional crisis manager, Deka served as the head of the IB's operations wing for over two decades before becoming its director. An expert in operations, Deka led the successful crackdown against the Indian Mujahideen network in the 2000s.

title: OnePlus N6 Review: The Most Focused OnePlus Phone in Years
description: The price of the OnePlus N6 in India starts at Rs. 22, 999 for the base variant
content: The OnePlus N6 is not the most powerful phone in its segment, and fortunately, it does not pretend to be either. Instead, it is built around practicality. The overall package somewhat justifies OnePlus's need for another series in its portfolio. With the OnePlus N6, the company has targeted those who want a reliable smartphone that lasts as long as possible on a single charge without sacrificing the software experience. So, if battery life ranks above everything else on your priority list, the OnePlus N6 makes a compelling case for itself.

title: US SEC vs NanoBit: Regulator Wins $5.4 Million Judgment in NanoBit Fraud Case
description: SEC says investors were misled by a fake crypto investment platform
content: The US Securities and Exchange Commission has secured a $5.4 million court judgment against NanoBit Limited and its affiliates over a crypto investment fraud scheme that targeted at least 18 investors between 2023 and 2024. The ruling follows allegations that the defendants used fake investment platforms, misleading social media promotions, and WhatsApp groups to deceive investors into transferring funds, which were instead diverted to the scheme's participants.

କୋଲକାତା: ପଶ୍ଚିମବଙ୍ଗର ପୂର୍ବ ମେଦିନୀପୁର ଜିଲ୍ଲାର ହଳଦିଆ ପେଟ୍ରୋକେମିକାଲ୍ସ କାରଖାନାର ନାଫ୍‌ଥା ପାଇପ୍‌ଲାଇନ୍‌ରେ ମଙ୍ଗଳବାର ଭୋର ସମୟରେ ଭୟଙ୍କର ଅଗ୍ନିକାଣ୍ଡ ଘଟି ୨୦ରୁ ଅଧିକ ଲୋକ ଆହତ ହୋଇଛନ୍ତି। ସେମାନଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ ୫ ଜଣଙ୍କ ଅବସ୍ଥା ଅତ୍ୟନ୍ତ ସଙ୍କଟାପନ୍ନ ରହିଛି। ଆହତମାନଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରେ କାରଖାନାର କର୍ମଚାରୀ, ସୁରକ୍ଷାକର୍ମୀ ଓ ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ବାସିନ୍ଦା ଅଛନ୍ତି।
ଆହୁରି ପଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ: ୟୁପିଆଇରେ ଯୋଡ଼ିହେଲା ଗ୍ରୀସ୍‌, ବାଣିଜ୍ୟ ଓ ଶିଳ୍ପମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ପୀୟୂଷ ଗୋୟଲ କଲେ ଉନ୍ମୋଚନ...
ସୂଚନା ଅନୁସାରେ, ରାତି ପ୍ରାୟ ୨ଟା ୪୫ ମିନିଟ୍‌ ସମୟରେ ପାଇପ୍‌ଲାଇନ୍‌ରେ ନିଆଁ ଲାଗିଥିଲା। ନାଫ୍‌ଥା ଅତ୍ୟଧିକ ଜ୍ୱଳନଶୀଳ ଥିବାରୁ ନିଆଁ ଦ୍ରୁତ ଗତିରେ ବ୍ୟାପି ନିକଟସ୍ଥ ହଳଦିଆ ପୌରସଂସ୍ଥାର ୧୩ ନମ୍ବର ୱାର୍ଡ ଅନ୍ତର୍ଗତ ଚିରଞ୍ଜୀବପୁର ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ପହଞ୍ଚିଥିଲା। ଏଥିରେ ଅନେକ ଘର କ୍ଷତିଗ୍ରସ୍ତ ହେବା ସହ ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ଆତଙ୍କ ସୃଷ୍ଟି ହୋଇଥିଲା। ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣାସ୍ଥଳରୁ କଳା ଧୂଆଁର ବିରାଟ କୁଣ୍ଡଳୀ ଆକାଶକୁ ଉଠୁଥିବା ଦେଖାଯାଇଥିଲା।ଖବର ପାଇବା ପରେ ଦମକଳ ବିଭାଗ ତୁରନ୍ତ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାନୁଷ୍ଠାନ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରିଥିଲା। ୧୨ରୁ ଅଧିକ ଦମକଳ ଗାଡ଼ି ନିଆଁ ଲିଭାଇବା କାମରେ ନିୟୋଜିତ ହୋଇଥିଲେ। ଦୀର୍ଘ ସମୟର ଉଦ୍ୟମ ପରେ ନିଆଁକୁ ନିୟନ୍ତ୍ରଣକୁ ଅଣାଯାଇଥିଲା। ଆହତମାନଙ୍କୁ ପ୍ରଥମେ ହଳଦିଆ ଉପଖଣ୍ଡ ହସ୍ପିଟାଲରେ ଭର୍ତ୍ତି କରାଯାଇଥିଲା। ସେମାନଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ ପ୍ରାୟ ୧୦ ଜଣଙ୍କୁ ଉନ୍ନତ ଚିକିତ୍ସା ପାଇଁ କୋଲକାତାର ଏସ୍‌ଏସ୍‌କେଏମ୍‌ ହସ୍ପିଟାଲ, ଏନ୍‌ଆର୍‌ଏସ୍‌ ମେଡିକାଲ୍‌ କଲେଜ୍‌ ଓ ଅନ୍ୟ ଦୁଇଟି ବେସରକାରୀ ହସ୍ପିଟାଲକୁ ସ୍ଥାନାନ୍ତର କରାଯାଇଛି। ଗୁରୁତର ଆହତ ୫ ଜଣଙ୍କ ଚିକିତ୍ସା ଉପରେ ଡାକ୍ତରମାନେ ନଜର ରଖିଛନ୍ତି।
ଅଗ୍ନିକାଣ୍ଡରେ ନିକଟସ୍ଥ ରେଳ ଲାଇନ୍‌ର ଉପରିଭାଗ ବିଦ୍ୟୁତ୍ ଉପକରଣ ମଧ୍ୟ କ୍ଷତିଗ୍ରସ୍ତ ହୋଇଥିବାରୁ କିଛି ସମୟ ପାଇଁ ରେଳ ଚଳାଚଳ ବାଧାପ୍ରାପ୍ତ ହୋଇଥିଲା। ଏହାର ପ୍ରଭାବରେ ହଳଦିଆ-ହାଓଡ଼ା ରୁଟ୍‌ରେ ଟ୍ରେନ୍‌ ଚଳାଚଳ ବ୍ୟାହତ ହୋଇଥିଲା। ପୁଲିସ ଓ ହଳଦିଆ ପେଟ୍ରୋକେମିକାଲ୍ସ କର୍ତ୍ତୃପକ୍ଷ କହିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ, ଘଟଣାର ପ୍ରକୃତ କାରଣ ଏପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ ହୋଇନାହିଁ। ପରିସ୍ଥିତି ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ସୁରକ୍ଷିତ ହେବା ପରେ ବିସ୍ତୃତ ତଦନ୍ତ କରାଯିବ।
ଆହୁରି ପଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ: ପେଟର ଚର୍ବି ହ୍ରାସ ପାଇଁ ଜୀବନଶୈଳୀରେ ସାମିଲ କରନ୍ତୁ ଏହି ଛୋଟ ଅଭ୍ୟାସ
ଅଧିକ ଦେଖନ୍ତୁ:

title: I grew BDO from $600 million to $3.4 billion. Here’s the 3-part formula that made it possible
description: BDO USA's outgoing CEO on why culture, AI, and employee ownership aren't separate priorities — they're a single system.
content:
For over a decade, I’ve led one of the country’s largest professional services firms through a period of massive change — growing revenue by nearly sixfold to more than $3.4 billion, expanding headcount in similar fashion, and establishing a new ownership structure, all while navigating digital disruption and a pandemic. As I reflect on what I’ve observed and learned after 14 years leading BDO USA, three interconnected themes emerge. They’re rooted in my experiences, and I believe they can apply to any organization, especially in times of rapid growth and intense change.



In Today’s Talent Race, Culture Is What Sets the Winners Apart



Like many industries, the accounting profession’s talent pipeline ebbs and flows, requiring leaders to regularly reevaluate, nurture, and pivot as organizational and employee needs evolve.



Organizations that thrive have often made people and culture central to their business strategies. They continually revisit how to attract, develop, and retain people as the talent landscape shifts. At BDO, over 90% of employees report a sense of belonging, according to our 2025 annual employee engagement survey. This isn’t a vanity metric; it translates directly to business. Nearly two-thirds of our firm’s growth over the past dozen years was organic, not acquired. Clients stayed, expanded their work, and referred us because of the relationships our people built. It’s an example of culture positively impacting a company’s bottom line.



When I first became CEO, I knew we needed a clear strategic foundation. That led to our CLIMB strategy — BDO’s first-ever firmwide strategic roadmap. It unified our business and helped us achieve the numerous milestones we have reached over the past decade. The “C” in CLIMB stands for “Culture.” I wanted to make it clear to employees, clients, and the industry that culture is the prerequisite for everything we do as an organization.



The initiatives that followed CLIMB were built on this foundation, helping guide decisions and reinforcing our commitment to helping people thrive. That commitment was tested in real time during the COVID-19 pandemic. In moments of uncertainty, leaders quickly learn whether culture is something they simply talk about or something they truly live by. Our leadership team leaned in — listening closely, communicating consistently, and trusting our people to navigate unprecedented disruption while continuing to deliver exceptional service to our clients. We emerged stronger than I could have anticipated, further reinforcing my belief that culture is not static; it is built together and must evolve alongside the people it exists to support.



Culture alone doesn’t keep talent engaged when work fundamentally changes. That’s where technology comes in — the second theme that has shaped my leadership tenure.



Firms Treating AI Just as an Efficiency Play Will Fall Behind



The temptation with AI is to view it solely as an efficiency tool — doing the same work faster and, in some areas of the business, reducing costs. Leaders who only see it through that lens miss the bigger opportunity — and risk losing the people who make their work possible. High performers want to apply their expertise to more complex and meaningful challenges. The real value of AI lies in augmenting the capacity of intellectually curious people with specialized training, sound judgment, and genuine human empathy.



That conviction has shaped how we approached AI at BDO. We have long believed technology, including AI, must be purpose-built to support the day-to-day needs of the people already using it. Since our people trust that technology supports them, we’re seeing meaningful returns on investment.



Through our Agent Builder program, our people have created hundreds of custom AI agents — some improving individual workflows, others shared across teams. BDO professionals aren’t just using AI for traditional applications; they’re building new ones. That kind of innovation doesn’t happen by accident. It’s the product of training and upskilling that gives our people the confidence to use these tools — freeing them to focus on the critical thinking, problem solving, and client advisory skills that technology cannot replace. Programs like our AI Ambassadors initiative, peer-led workshops, and customized learning paths have laid that foundation.



Agentic AI is the latest advancement in a line of innovations that have transformed organizations like BDO. The lesson from every previous wave holds true: organizations are better positioned to navigate change when they’ve built a culture that embraces it. That starts with trust. If people don’t trust that a company’s leadership is investing in their future, they won’t fully embrace transformation. No amount of investment will deliver returns without your people’s buy-in and support.



Transformation Sticks When People Have a Stake in the Outcome



Culture sets the foundation. Technology provides the tools. Lasting transformation requires something more. People need to believe that the success they are building is genuinely shared.



For BDO, the priority has always been to build a multigenerational firm, not solely to deliver returns on a fixed time horizon. That’s why in 2023, we became the first major accounting and advisory firm to establish an Employee Stock Ownership Plan (ESOP), effectively giving every employee a beneficial ownership stake in the firm at no cost to them and a unique opportunity to enhance their personal financial well-being.



The impact has been more than financial — it’s been behavioral. When we ask professionals to embrace new tools and processes, they don’t ask how it affects their job. They ask, “How does this affect the value I own?” That mindset shift is what separates compliance from commitment.



People who feel they own a stake in the outcome don’t just adopt change — they drive it. I’m not arguing that an ESOP is the right model for every company. I am arguing that leaders should ask themselves a harder question: Does your company’s structure give people a genuine reason to go all in? If the answer is no, culture and technology investments alone won’t close the gap.



Ultimately, sustainable transformation takes hold when people are not only supported by culture and technology, but also personally invested in the collective success of the organization.



The Choices Ahead



The past 14 years have reinforced one thing for me: there is no single investment that drives transformation. It’s the interplay between a culture that values people, technology that elevates their expertise, and a structure that gives them a genuine stake in the outcome.



The best people want to solve hard problems and make a real difference. They’re also asking whether the companies they join will invest in them, and whether they’ll have a voice. The leaders who ask the hard questions about how these pieces fit together — and move intentionally on the answers — will shape the next decade.



The opinions expressed in Fortune.com commentary pieces are solely the views of their authors and do not necessarily reflect the opinions and beliefs of Fortune.
This story was originally featured on Fortune.com

title: Kunal Kemmu Exclusive: Alliance, Reality Shows, Soha Ali Khan, Madgaon Express 2, Career Lull; N18V
description: Kunal Kemmu marked his hosting debut with the reality show Alliance, which is currently streaming on Prime Video. In an exclusive chat with CNN-News18's Titas Chowdhury, he talks about being nervous about this stint and why he turned down the opportunity to be a part of reality shows as a contestant despite being approached for them multiple times. He recalls the time when work had dried up and he sat at home for eight months and reveals that he has finished writing Madgaon Express. Kunal also talks about Soha Ali Khan, his 'best friend', his first date with her and Saif Ali Khan being the first member of the Pataudi family he had met after officially dating her. Watch the interview for more. #kunalkemmu #exclusiveinterview

title: Graphic of the day: Investment bets
description: New project investment proposals rose from Rs 11.3 lakh crore in Q1 FY26 to Rs 14.3 lakh crore in Q1 FY27 (till date), but the project mix has shifted sharply, shows data from economic and business database CMIE. Nuclear energy surged from under Rs 1 lakh crore in Q1FY26 to Rs 6.8 lakh crore in Q1FY27 and data centres to Rs 4.7 lakh crore in the same period. Maharashtra alone drew nearly 83 percent of announcements, hosting both clusters. Meanwhile, renewables, manufacturing, and transport services all fell steeply. The decline reflects the West Asia crisis, which has dampened trade-exposed, capital-sensitive sectors like manufacturing and transport.

Amarnath Yatra-2026: Heavy motor vehicle movement restricted on Jammu-Srinagar NH-44 from July 1 evening
description:
Banihal, June 30: In view of the commencement of the annual Shri Amarnath Ji Yatra-2026, with the first batch of pilgrims scheduled to leave from Jammu on July 2, traffic authorities have issued a fresh advisory regulating movement on the Jammu-Srinagar National Highway (NH-44).
As per the advisory, no movement of Heavy Motor Vehicles (HMVs) will be allowed from Qazigund towards Jammu and from Jakheni (Udhampur) towards Srinagar after 1900 hours on July 1, 2026. However, Light Motor Vehicles (LMVs) will be permitted to move till 2300 hours.
The Traffic Police said that after the movement of the Yatra convoy on July 2, up-direction LMVs, private cars and passenger service vehicles (HPSVs) will be allowed from Nagrota (Jammu) towards Udhampur once the tail of the up Yatra convoy crosses Jakheni (Udhampur).
Similarly, down-direction LMVs, private cars and HPSVs will be allowed from Qazigund towards Jammu after the tail of the down Baltal Yatra convoy crosses Marog. Commuters have been advised to follow daily traffic advisories for exact cut-off timings.
Regarding heavy vehicles, the advisory stated that HMVs will be allowed to ply on alternate days only, depending on the prevailing traffic situation. No HMV will be permitted from Qazigund or Jakheni after 7 PM during the Yatra period.
The Traffic Police has advised operators carrying fresh produce, perishable goods and livestock to plan their movement accordingly to avoid inconvenience.
It further stated that after the cut-off timings, intra-district movement of local commuters across Jammu and Kashmir will be facilitated only after verification of valid photo identity cards, which commuters must carry during the Yatra period.
The authorities have appealed to the public to plan their journeys in advance and cooperate with Traffic Police and other agencies for smooth and safe conduct of the Shri Amarnath Ji Yatra-2026.

title: Five seps for redesigning work in the age of AI
description: When Publicis Sapient’s chief marketing and communications officer sought to drive growth without increasing expenses or headcount, she turned to the natural solution for a company whose products promise to unlock AI-driven enhancements and efficiencies: more AI.Teresa Barreira believed in the vision Publicis Sapient promoted to its clients. It was a bet on her own company’s pitch that AI is a resource equalizer — a catalyst that could help challenger brands compete with anyone.An initial plan offered employees leeway to incorporate AI into their workflows, with a simple mandate for marketing employees to use AI tools in their jobs, and report back after six months.The results, if not exactly failure, were far from a resounding success.The new tools brought supercharged capabilities, but results remained largely unchanged because the team had not redesigned how it worked. Achieving organizational transformation seemed elusive.The experience, as the firm's head of marketing innovation incubator recalled, was “like a farmer plugging electricity into their horse.”The struggle, recounted in the new Darden Business Publishing technical note “Redesigning Work in the Age of AI: Publicis Sapient's Five-Step Marketing Transformation,” is one of the endemic management challenges of the moment, according to Kimberly A. Whitler, the Frank M. Sands Sr. Associate Professor at the University of Virginia's Darden School of Business.“Everyone knows how important AI is right now, and marketers and companies everywhere are taking different approaches,” said Whitler. “Right now, most organizations are struggling to maximize transformation. This is normal as early iterations are centered on experimentation.”While Publicis Sapient could have thrown in the towel or simply checked the box on use of the new tools, Barreira and her team were determined to figure out how to make them work for the benefit of the organization. They committed to devising a process to figure out how to ideally work and grow in an era of transformative technology.“Their early experimentation was crucial. It not only led them to an approach that ultimately drove transformation, but the invitation to experiment actually prepared the organization to embrace AI,” said Whitler. “Because they worked through the initial struggle, they are ahead of many of their peers, and I think there are some real aha moments in their approach.”Changing the Nature of the Work ItselfWhen organizations decide to bring AI capabilities into an organization, it's critical they have goals in mind. Is AI simply a worker productivity boost? Is it being brought in with the goal of replacing human labor?In the case of Publicis Sapient, Barreira's goal for AI was clear: The new capabilities should fundamentally change the nature of work so that employees could “spend their time on the most critical activities that would yield the greatest impact.”Using the tools to complete existing work faster did nothing to further the goals of transformation and impact. And yet, the initial six-month exploratory period was not time wasted. After half a year of experimenting, AI had been infused in the company's culture, and employees were comfortable with the tools.“They initially saw it as a failure, but I see it as a critical first step,” Whitler said. “They demystified AI and got participation from the bottom up, and the people at the top better understood the work being done across the organization.”Also Read: 5 rules for getting AI right in your organizationEmbracing the issue with a mindset of continuous improvement, the Publicis Sapient leadership team continued to iterate on its approach and eventually devised a five-step framework for redesigning marketing work in the age of AI.1. Experimenting with AI tools and agents. Given an invitation to explore, teams grew comfortable with the new tools, laying critical groundwork for future steps.2. Mapping tasks across the Marketing and Communications function. Aiding visibility across the marketing group, tasks were mapped across every unit, allowing all stakeholders to better understand the nature of their team's work. Tasks were further segmented into those that could be done by AI alone, those in which AI could aid humans and those best suited to humans alone.3. Turning marketers into builders. With AI agents easier to build than ever, Publicis Sapient leaders made marketers the architects of the tools they wanted and would actually use.4. Redesigning workflows end to end. While assistants brought certain efficiencies, the real gains came from redesigning workflows with AI in mind. In one example Whitler cites, a marketing campaign that historically would have had 50 distinct touchpoints or approvals before completion required only nine, and the development timeline was cut from 20 days to as few as three.5. Refining roles and job descriptions. Planning to make the transformation sustainable, marketers were instructed to write a new job description for their new roles and spell out how they planned to reinvest their time now that so much of it had been freed up by automation.Critically, leadership made clear that while AI-powered transformation was now an expected part of a high-performance culture, it was also a culture they were all forging together. One day of the month, called Pause For Learning Day, was devoted to nothing more than continuous education; employee-led AI Thursdays occurred twice a month; and on Failure Fridays teams shared what went wrong, with the individual who had failed fastest and learned the most receiving an award.The proof of the approach showed up in key performance indicators, with significant measurable improvement in operational and growth metrics.The Shortsightedness of Prioritizing EfficiencyAlthough devised in a marketing group, the approach has potential implications for any organization struggling to incorporate new technologies at a time of rapid change, said Whitler. The transformation is almost certainly not going to be an easy process but doing nothing in the face of such new capabilities is likely to yield less productivity and an increasingly nervous workforce.“There's so much wisdom in their approach, because there's so much research showing that people are terrified of AI taking their jobs,” said Whitler. “The best way to protect against that is to bring people together and figure it out.”While AI-related job losses can be seen in news headlines every week, and many major companies have been explicit in their statements tying layoffs to AI efficiencies, such moves may prove to be shortsighted at this stage of AI adoption, says Whitler.“Is AI going to amplify output and accelerate growth, or is it going to simply drive efficiency and eliminate cost?” Whitler said. “Figuring out how to drive significant transformation that drives extraordinary new performance outcomes is generally the business amplifier.”Professor Kimberly A. Whitler is the author of the technical note, “Redesigning Work in the Age of AI: Publicis Sapient’s Five-Step Marketing Transformation,” published by Darden Business Publishing (April 2026).

title: Fiscal Deficit Data: April-May deficit at Rs 1.62 lakh crore; capital expenditure at Rs 2.51 lakh crore
description: Fiscal Deficit Data: Centre’s fiscal deficit stood at Rs 1.62 lakh crore in April-May, with total expenditure at Rs 8.81 lakh crore, capital expenditure at Rs 2.51 lakh crore, and gross tax revenue at Rs 5.24 lakh crore, while May alone recorded a fiscal surplus of Rs 2,000 crore.
content: Fiscal Deficit Data: India’s fiscal deficit stood at Rs 1.624 lakh crore in April-May of financial year 2026-27, which accounts for 9.6 per cent of the full-year target, data released by the Controller General of Accounts (CGA) showed on Tuesday.The government has fixed a fiscal deficit target of Rs 16.96 lakh crore for the full financial year (FY27), which shows that the figures for the first two months reflect a strong fiscal position with the country on track to meet the target set in the Budget for 2026-27.In the corresponding period of FY26, the fiscal deficit stood at Rs 13,163 crore, or 0.8 per cent of the full-year target.The Government recorded a fiscal surplus of Rs 2 lakh crore in May, compared with a surplus of Rs 1.73 lakh crore in May last year. In April, the government had reported total receipts of Rs 2.13 lakh crore and total expenditure of Rs 5.75 lakh crore, which left a fiscal deficit of around Rs 3.62 lakh crore for the first month of the financial year, according to the monthly data.Non-tax revenue stood at Rs 3.27 lakh crore in May, compared with Rs 2.90 lakh crore in the same month last year. The May number came after the Reserve Bank of India’s Central Board approved a surplus transfer of Rs 2.87 lakh crore to the central government for FY26.Capital expenditure in May stood at Rs 61,200 crore, compared with Rs 61,600 crore in the same month of the previous year. For April-May, however, capital expenditure rose to Rs 2.51 lakh crore from Rs 2.21 lakh crore a year earlier.Gross tax revenue for April-May stood at Rs 5.25 lakh crore, compared with Rs 5.15 lakh crore in the same period last year, the data showed.The Government achieved its fiscal deficit target of 4.4 per cent in the financial year 2025-26 and has lowered the target further to 4.3 per cent of GDP for the current financial year as part of the fiscal consolidation process.A decline in the fiscal deficit strengthens the fundamentals of the economy and paves the way for growth with price stability. It leads to a reduction in borrowing by the government, thus leaving more funds in the banking sector for lending to corporates and consumers which leads to higher economic growth.Fiscal Deficit Data | HighlightsFiscal deficit stood at Rs 1.62 lakh crore in April-MayTotal expenditure stood at Rs 8.81 lakh crore in April-MayCapital expenditure stood at Rs 2.51 lakh crore in April-MayTotal tax revenue stood at Rs 5.24 lakh crore in April-MayFiscal surplus stood at Rs 2 lakh crore in May

description: नाशिक | प्रतिनिधी | Nashik पंचवटीतील मखमलाबाद रोडवरील ड्रीम कॅसल सिग्नल ते मधुबन कॉलनीदरम्यान रात्रीच्या वेळी टवाळखोर, उपद्रवी आणि मद्यपींनी उच्छाद मांडला असून, स्थानिक रहिवासी त्रस्त झाले आहेत. पोलिसांची गाडी नियमितपणे राऊंड मारत असली, तरीही या टवाळखोरांवर पाऊण टक्काही धाक राहिलेला नाही, अशी संतापजनक व नित्याचीच परिस्थिती निर्माण झाली आहे. ड्रीम कॅसल सिग्नलच्या अगदी बाजूलाच […]
content:
नाशिक | प्रतिनिधी | Nashik



पंचवटीतील मखमलाबाद रोडवरील ड्रीम कॅसल सिग्नल ते मधुबन कॉलनीदरम्यान रात्रीच्या वेळी टवाळखोर, उपद्रवी आणि मद्यपींनी उच्छाद मांडला असून, स्थानिक रहिवासी त्रस्त झाले आहेत. पोलिसांची गाडी नियमितपणे राऊंड मारत असली, तरीही या टवाळखोरांवर पाऊण टक्काही धाक राहिलेला नाही, अशी संतापजनक व नित्याचीच परिस्थिती निर्माण झाली आहे.



ड्रीम कॅसल सिग्नलच्या अगदी बाजूलाच मद्यालय (वाइन शॉप) व लहान-मोठे खाद्यपदार्थ विक्रेते हातगाड्या लावत असल्याने या टवाळांचा राबता दिवसेंदिवस वाढत आहे. रात्री नऊनंतर तर हा संपूर्ण रस्ता जणू या उपद्रवी घटकांनी ताब्यात घेतल्याचे चित्र असते. ड्रीम कॅसल बिल्डिंगसह बाजूच्याच एका रेसिडेन्शियल कॉम्प्लेक्सच्या पायऱ्यांवर बसून हे टवाळखोर सर्रास मद्य प्राशन करत ओपन बार मांडतात.



यामुळे रात्रीच्या वेळी शतपावलीसाठी बाहेर पडणाऱ्या महिला, लहान मुले आणि ज्येष्ठ नागरिकांना मानसिक त्रास व असुरक्षिततेचा सामना करावा लागत आहे. भीतीपोटी अनेकांनी तक्रारी नोंदविण्याकडे दुर्लक्ष केल्याचा पुरेपूर फायदा हे टवाळखोर घेत आहेत. या भागात येऊन उच्छाद मांडणाऱ्या आणि महिलांची सुरक्षा धोक्यात आणणाऱ्या टवाळखोरांना जागीच चोप देऊन कायदेशीर कारवाई करण्याची मागणी मधुबन कॉलनी व मखमलाबादरोड परिसरातील रहिवाशांनी केली आहे.



पोलिसांची केवळ सायरनवारी!



पोलीस रात्री येतात, सायरन वाजवतात आणि निघून जातातफ परंतु रस्त्यावरील अनधिकृत हातगाड्या किंवा रात्री उशिरापर्यंत सुरू असणाऱ्या आस्थापनांना बंद करण्याच्या साध्या सूचनाही पोलिसांकडून दिल्या नाहीत, असा आरोप नागरिकांनी केला आहे. त्यामुळे पंचवटी पोलिसांची ही ढिलाई टवाळांच्या पथ्यावर पडत आहे.



बेफाम वाहनांची हुल्लडबाजी



ड्रीम कॅसल सिग्नल ते थेट चैतन्य बेकरीपर्यंत रात्रीच्या नऊ ते एक वाजेपर्यंत महागड्या कार आणि दुचाकीवरून बेफाम वेगाने धावून कर्णकर्कश आवाज काढले जातात. या हुल्लडबाजीमुळे येथील हॉस्पिटलमधील रुग्णांच्या आरोग्याचा प्रश्न निर्माण झाला आहे. नवनाथनगर, हनुमानवाडी, क्रांतीनगर, मधुबन कॉलनी, वडजाईमातानगर, पंचवटी आणि मखमलाबाद परिसरातील काही सराईत व टवाळखोर येथे एकत्र येतात.

description: Breakfast Movie: రానవ్ – రోస్మిన్ ప్రధానమైన పాత్రలను పోషించిన తమిళ సినిమానే ‘బ్రేక్ ఫాస్ట్’. గిరిజా వరదరాజ్ నిర్మించిన ఈ సినిమాకి, గాంధీకృష్ణ దర్శకత్వం వహించాడు....
content:
Breakfast Movie: రానవ్ – రోస్మిన్ ప్రధానమైన పాత్రలను పోషించిన తమిళ సినిమానే ‘బ్రేక్ ఫాస్ట్’. గిరిజా వరదరాజ్ నిర్మించిన ఈ సినిమాకి, గాంధీకృష్ణ దర్శకత్వం వహించాడు. జీవీ ప్రకాశ్ కుమార్ సంగీతాన్ని సమకూర్చిన ఈ సినిమా, ఏప్రిల్ 24వ తేదీన థియేటర్లకు వచ్చింది. సంపత్ రాజ్ – అర్చన కీలకమైన పాత్రలను పోషించిన ఈ సినిమా, ఈ నెల 24వ తేదీ నుంచి ‘అమెజాన్ ప్రైమ్’లో స్ట్రీమింగ్ అవుతోంది. తమిళంతో పాటు తెలుగు .. కన్నడ భాషల్లో ఈ సినిమా అందుబాటులో ఉంది.



Read Also: Nani The Paradise Movie: నాని ‘ద ప్యారడైజ్’ మూవీ మరోసారి వాయిదా?



breakfast movie review



Breakfast Movie: కథ



రిషభ్, లక్ష్మీ అనే కొత్తగా పెళ్లైన దంపతులు కేవలం మూడు నెలలకే విడిపోవాలని నిర్ణయించుకుంటారు. కౌన్సిలింగ్ కోసం వారు సైకియాట్రిస్ట్ గంగాదేవి (కస్తూరి)ని కలుస్తారు. వారి మధ్య ఉన్న గొడవలను చూసిన గంగాదేవి, వారికి గతంలో జరిగిన శంతను, జాన్వీల ప్రేమకథను చెప్పడం మొదలుపెడుతుంది. అక్కడి నుంచి అసలు కథ ఫ్లాష్‌బ్యాక్‌లోకి వెళ్తుంది. శంతను (రానవ్) ఇంజనీరింగ్ పూర్తి చేసి, మలేసియాలో జాబ్ చేసి కొన్ని కారణాల వల్ల తిరిగి వచ్చేస్తాడు. కానీ తాను ఇంకా మలేసియాలోనే ఉన్నట్లు నమ్మిస్తూ, తండ్రి వైద్యానికి డబ్బులు పంపుతుంటాడు. సర్టిఫికెట్స్ సీజ్ అవ్వడంతో దొరికిన పనులు చేసుకునే శంతను, ఒకరోజు కోటీశ్వరుడైన రాజారామ్ (సంపత్ రాజ్) కూతురు జాన్వీ (రోస్మిన్) కంటపడతాడు. శంతను వ్యక్తిత్వం నచ్చి జాన్వీ తన బిస్కట్ కంపెనీలో ఉద్యోగం ఇస్తుంది. ఆ పరిచయం కాస్తా ప్రేమగా మారి, తండ్రిని ఎదిరించి ఇద్దరూ పెళ్లి చేసుకుంటారు.



ఫస్టాఫ్‌లో శ్రీమంతురాలైన జాన్వీ, పేదింటి శంతనును ప్రేమించి పెళ్లి చేసుకోవడం, తన సంస్థ బాధ్యతలను అతనికి అప్పగించడం వరకు కథ చకచకా సాగిపోతుంది. అయితే సెకండాఫ్‌లో శంతను పల్లెటూరి తల్లిదండ్రులు వీరి ఇంటికి రావడంతో అసలు సమస్య మొదలవుతుంది. వారి అలవాట్లు, అమాయకత్వం నచ్చని జాన్వీ వారి పట్ల కఠినంగా ప్రవర్తిస్తుంది. దీనితో భార్యాభర్తల మధ్య అహం (ఈగో)లు తలెత్తి కథ ప్రీ-క్లైమాక్స్ దిశగా వేడెక్కుతుంది. సాధారణంగా ఇలాంటి కథల్లో ధనవంతుడైన తండ్రి విలన్‌గా మారి ఇబ్బంది పెడతాడు. కానీ ఇక్కడ తండ్రి పాత్ర పక్కకు వెళ్లిపోయి, భార్యాభర్తలే ఒకరితో ఒకరు తలపడటం కొత్తగా అనిపిస్తుంది. ముగింపులో వచ్చే ఒక అంచనాలకు అందని ట్విస్ట్ అప్పటివరకు చూసిన కథ బరువును పెంచి, సినిమాను యావరేజ్ ప్లేస్‌లో నిలబెడుతుంది.



నటీనటుల ప్రతిభ 



రోస్మిన్ & రానవ్ కథ మొత్తం వీరి చుట్టూనే తిరుగుతుంది. డబ్బు, అహంభావం ఉన్న పాత్రలో రోస్మిన్ నటన ఆకట్టుకోగా, తల్లిదండ్రుల పట్ల బాధ్యత గల యువకుడిగా రానవ్ మంచి మార్కులు కొట్టేసాడు. ఇతర నటీనటులు, సంపత్ రాజ్, అర్చన, కస్తూరి తమ పరిధి మేరకు బాగానే చేశారు. జీవీ ప్రకాశ్ కుమార్ అందించిన సంగీతం, పన్నీర్ సెల్వమ్ ఫొటోగ్రఫీ ఫరవాలేదనిపిస్తాయి. భాస్కర్ ఎడిటింగ్ ఓకే.



ముగింపు




తల్లిదండ్రులను ప్రేమించలేనివారు మరెవరినీ ప్రేమించలేరు. ఈగోల కోసం వైవాహిక జీవితాన్ని నాశనం చేసుకోకుండా, సర్దుకుపోవడంలోనే సంతోషం ఉంటుంది” అనే మంచి సందేశాన్ని ఈ చిత్రం ఇస్తుంది. ఒక ఓ మోస్తరు (యావరేజ్) ఫ్యామిలీ డ్రామాను చూడాలనుకునే వారు అమెజాన్ ప్రైమ్‌లో ఈ చిత్రాన్ని వీక్షించవచ్చు.

title: డెలివరీ బాయ్‌పై దాడి కేసు.. స్పందించిన ‘రాజు వెడ్స్ రాంబాయి’ హీరో..అసలు ట్విస్ట్ ఇదీ!
description: Akhil Raj: ఆన్‌లైన్ డెలివరీ బాయ్‌పై దాడి చేశారనే ఆరోపణలతో గత రెండు రోజులుగా వార్తల్లో నిలిచిన ‘రాజు వెడ్స్ రాంబాయి’ (Raju Weds Rambhai) చిత్ర...
content:
Akhil Raj: ఆన్‌లైన్ డెలివరీ బాయ్‌పై దాడి చేశారనే ఆరోపణలతో గత రెండు రోజులుగా వార్తల్లో నిలిచిన ‘రాజు వెడ్స్ రాంబాయి’ (Raju Weds Rambhai) చిత్ర కథానాయకుడు అఖిల్ రాజ్ (Akhil Raj) ఎట్టకేలకు ఈ వివాదంపై అధికారికంగా స్పందించారు. సోషల్ మీడియాలో జరుగుతున్న ప్రచారంలో నిజం లేదని, అసలు తప్పు డెలివరీ బాయ్‌దేనంటూ ఆయన సంచలన విషయాలను బయటపెట్టారు. తాను కూడా ఒకప్పుడు డెలివరీ బాయ్‌గా పనిచేసి ఈ స్థాయికి వచ్చినవాడినేనని, ఆ కష్టం విలువ తనకు బాగా తెలుసని అఖిల్ రాజ్ ఎమోషనల్ అయ్యారు.



Read Also:Hero Akhil Raj Controversy: డెలివరీ బాయ్‌‌‌ని కొట్టిన ‘రాజు వెడ్స్ రాంబాయి’ హీరో..



అసలు ఏం జరిగింది? అఖిల్ రాజ్ వెర్షన్ ఇదీ



ఈ వివాదానికి గల ముందస్తు కారణాలను, తన ఇంట్లోకి వచ్చి జరిగిన గొడవను హీరో అఖిల్ రాజ్ మీడియా ముందు వివరించారు. డెలివరీ బాయ్ మొదట తమ చిరునామా కాకుండా తప్పుడు అడ్రస్‌కు పార్సిల్ ఇచ్చి వెళ్లాడని, ఆ తర్వాత తప్పు తెలుసుకుని తిరిగి తమ ఇంటికి వచ్చి అత్యంత అసభ్యంగా ప్రవర్తించాడని అఖిల్ ఆరోపించారు. సదరు డెలివరీ బాయ్ పూర్తిగా మద్యం మత్తులో ఉన్నాడని.. తమ మధ్య మాట మాట పెరిగిన క్రమంలో తన తల్లిని తీవ్ర పదజాలంతో దుర్భాషలాడాడని హీరో పేర్కొన్నారు. ఆ క్లిష్ట పరిస్థితుల్లోనే కేవలం వాగ్వాదం (ఆవేశంలో తోపులాట) జరిగిందే తప్ప.. కావాలని ఎవరిపైనా ప్లాన్డ్ గా తాను దాడి చేయలేదని ఆయన స్పష్టం చేశారు.



Akhil Raj: “నేనూ ఒకప్పుడు డెలివరీ బాయ్‌నే..” – ఎమోషనల్ కామెంట్స్



సెలబ్రిటీ హోదాలో ఉండి డెలివరీ బాయ్స్ పట్ల అహంకారంతో ప్రవర్తించారంటూ నెటిజన్లు చేస్తున్న ట్రోలింగ్‌కు అఖిల్ రాజ్ గట్టి కౌంటర్ ఇచ్చారు. “నేను నేరుగా హీరో కాలేదు. సినిమా ఇండస్ట్రీలోకి రాకముందు నేను కూడా ఒక సాధారణ డెలివరీ బాయ్‌గా వీధుల్లో తిరిగి కష్టపడ్డాను. ఎండనక, వాననక వారు చేసే ఉద్యోగం విలువ, పడే శ్రమ నాకు పక్కాగా తెలుసు. అలాంటిది నేను ఒక డెలివరీ బాయ్‌పై కక్ష గట్టి దాడి చేస్తానా?” అని అఖిల్ రాజ్ ప్రశ్నించారు. కేవలం తన తల్లిని అవమానించినందుకే ఒక కొడుకుగా స్పందించాల్సి వచ్చిందని ఆయన క్లారిటీ ఇచ్చారు.

title: ఏపీలో మారిన అంగన్‌వాడీ కేంద్రాల పని వేళలు!
description: AP Anganwadi timings:ఆంధ్రప్రదేశ్ ప్రభుత్వం అంగన్‌వాడీ కేంద్రాల సమయాల్లో మార్పులు చేస్తూ కీలక నిర్ణయం తీసుకుంది. ఎన్నికల విధుల్లో భాగంగా బీఎల్‌ఓ బాధ్యతలు చూస్తున్న టీచర్ల పనిభారం...
content:
AP Anganwadi timings:ఆంధ్రప్రదేశ్ ప్రభుత్వం అంగన్‌వాడీ కేంద్రాల సమయాల్లో మార్పులు చేస్తూ కీలక నిర్ణయం తీసుకుంది. ఎన్నికల విధుల్లో భాగంగా బీఎల్‌ఓ బాధ్యతలు చూస్తున్న టీచర్ల పనిభారం తగ్గించడానికి ఈ వెసులుబాటు కల్పించారు. ఈ మార్పులు జూన్ 29 నుండి జూలై 28 వరకు అమలులో ఉంటాయి. సంబంధిత కేంద్రాలు ఈ ఒక నెల రోజులు ఉదయం 10 గంటల నుంచి మధ్యాహ్నం 3 గంటల వరకు మాత్రమే పనిచేస్తాయి. ఈ కొత్త నిబంధన కేవలం ఎన్నికల విధుల్లో ఉన్న వారికి మాత్రమే పరిమితం చేశారు.



Read also: Bibigudem West Bypass Road Accident: లారీ-ట్యాంకర్ మధ్య నలిగిన కారు..ముగ్గురు మృతి!



Changes in Anganwadi center timings



సేవలపై ప్రభావం ఉండదు



కేంద్రాల పని వేళలు మారినప్పటికీ గర్భిణులు, బాలింతలు, చిన్నారులకు అందే పోషకాహార సేవల్లో ఎలాంటి అంతరాయం ఉండదని అధికారులు స్పష్టం చేశారు. ప్రభుత్వ నిబంధనల ప్రకారం లబ్ధిదారులకు అందాల్సిన పౌష్టికాహారం సకాలంలో అందుతుంది. ఎన్నికల విధులు నిర్వహిస్తున్న టీచర్లు తమ బాధ్యతలను సక్రమంగా నిర్వర్తించేలా ఈ నిర్ణయం తీసుకున్నారు. మిగిలిన సాధారణ అంగన్‌వాడీ కేంద్రాలు ఎప్పటిలాగే పాత సమయాల్లోనే కొనసాగుతాయి. కాబట్టి ప్రజలు ఎటువంటి ఆందోళన చెందాల్సిన అవసరం లేదు.



AP Anganwadi timings:గమనించాల్సిన ముఖ్య విషయాలు



ఎన్నికల విధులు లేని సాధారణ అంగన్‌వాడీ కేంద్రాలకు ఈ కొత్త టైమింగ్స్ వర్తించవు. వారు యథావిధిగా తమ పాత పని వేళల్లోనే సేవలు అందిస్తారు. కేవలం బీఎల్‌ఓ విధులు నిర్వహిస్తున్న టీచర్లు పనిచేసే కేంద్రాలకే ఈ వెసులుబాటు ఉంటుంది. ఆయా కేంద్రాల పరిధిలోని ప్రజలు, తల్లులు ఈ విషయాన్ని గమనించి సహకరించాలి. జూలై 28 తర్వాత మళ్ళీ యథాతథ సమయాల్లోనే కేంద్రాలు పనిచేస్తాయి. ప్రభుత్వం తీసుకున్న ఈ నిర్ణయం వల్ల సిబ్బంది పని ఒత్తిడి తగ్గి, కార్యకలాపాలు సాఫీగా సాగుతాయి.

title: Shimla Accident: शिमला में खाई में गिरी कार, पिता-पुत्री की मौत, मां और बेटे ने आंखों के सामने खोए अपने प्रियजन
description:
हिमाचल डेस्कः प्रदेश के शिमला जिले में मंगलवार सुबह एक बेहद दर्दनाक सड़क हादसे में पिता और पुत्री की मौत हो गई। नेरवा क्षेत्र की रुस्लाह पंचायत के बाबी कैंची में कार मोड़ते समय वह अनियंत्रित होकर गहरी खाई में जा गिरी। हादसे के समय मां और बेटा कार के बाहर खड़े थे और उनकी.
The post Shimla Accident: शिमला में खाई में गिरी कार, पिता-पुत्री की मौत, मां और बेटे ने आंखों के सामने खोए अपने प्रियजन appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.
content:
हिमाचल डेस्कः प्रदेश के शिमला जिले में मंगलवार सुबह एक बेहद दर्दनाक सड़क हादसे में पिता और पुत्री की मौत हो गई। नेरवा क्षेत्र की रुस्लाह पंचायत के बाबी कैंची में कार मोड़ते समय वह अनियंत्रित होकर गहरी खाई में जा गिरी। हादसे के समय मां और बेटा कार के बाहर खड़े थे और उनकी आंखों के सामने यह दर्दनाक दुर्घटना हो गई।
ये भी पढ़ें :-

मुंबई में स्कूल बस पर गिरा पेड़, 1 छात्र की मौत; 10 से ज्यादा बच्चे घायल

जानकारी के अनुसार, मंगलवार सुबह करीब 6 बजे 43 वर्षीय लोकेन्द्र धनाईक पुत्र हरीमन धनाईक और उनकी 11 वर्षीय बेटी टिया की मौके पर ही मौत हो गई। दोनों बाबी गांव, पंचायत रुस्लाह, तहसील नेरवा के निवासी थे। दुर्घटना इतनी भीषण थी कि कार एचआर-26बीबी-7294 के परखच्चे उड़ गए।
बताया जा रहा है कि नेरवा में दुकान चलाने वाले लोकेन्द्र परिवार के साथ 3 दिन की छुट्टियां बिताने के बाद वापस नेरवा लौट रहे थे। बॉबी कैंची में खड़ी कार को सड़क पर मोड़ते समय उनकी बेटी टिया कार में बैठ गई, जबकि पत्नी शालू और बेटा बाहर खड़े होकर कार के मुड़ने का इंतजार कर रहे थे। इसी दौरान कार अचानक अनियंत्रित होकर गहरी खाई में जा गिरी।
हादसे की सूचना मिलते ही आसपास के ग्रामीण मौके पर पहुंचे और पिता-पुत्री को खाई से निकालकर सिविल अस्पताल नेरवा पहुंचाया, जहां डॉक्टरों ने दोनों को मृत घोषित कर दिया। घटना के बाद पूरे क्षेत्र में शोक की लहर है। स्थानीय प्रशासन की ओर से नायब तहसीलदार नेरवा, सूरत राम ने मृतकों के परिजनों को तत्काल राहत के रूप में 50 हजार रुपये की आर्थिक सहायता प्रदान की। पुलिस ने मामला दर्ज कर दुर्घटना के कारणों की जांच शुरू कर दी है।
ये भी पढ़ें :-

title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce wedding invites reportedly came with NDAs, ahead of rumoured Madison Square Garden nuptials
description:
The couple are reportedly set to tie the knot in NYC this weekend
The post Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce wedding invites reportedly came with NDAs, ahead of rumoured Madison Square Garden nuptials  appeared first on NME.
content:
Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding invitations reportedly included NDAs, ahead of the couple’s rumoured nuptials at Madison Square Garden.
The pop megastar announced her engagement to the Kansas City Chiefs tight end last August, after two years of dating. Kelce’s father subsequently revealed that the NFL player had proposed around two weeks prior.

READ MORE: Taylor Swift – ‘The Life Of A Showgirl’ review: magical when the songwriter just lets herself be

Earlier this month, New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani seemingly confirmed that the wedding would coincide with Independence Day in the US (July 4).


A spokesperson later said that his comment was only based on a TMZ report, which claimed that a permit had been requested for NYC’s Madison Square Garden for the July 4 weekend.
Then, last week NBC News cited a source who said the 19,500-capacity arena was preparing for a major event that same weekend.
The source in question, who is said to be among the invitees, told the outlet that 1,100 people were expected to attend Swift and Kelce’s wedding ceremony at MSG this Friday (July 3).

They also claimed that invitees had been sent non-disclosure agreements (NDAs) along with electronic invitations. The source added that the ceremony would include various live performances from several artists.
This follows reports that Stevie Nicks will be taking to the stage at the high-profile wedding. Swift was recently spotted celebrating the New York Knicks’ victory with the Haim sisters, notably while wearing a shirt that read “Stevie Knicks”, which many have taken as an Easter egg about her upcoming nuptials.

| Taylor Swift and the HAIM sisters at the Knicks game!
"Knickelback, Stevie Knicks, Knickole Kidman" pic.twitter.com/LkphqDAZsd
— The Eras Tour (@tswifterastour) June 11, 2026

According to TMZ, every wedding invitation has been individually watermarked with the guest’s first and last name repeated throughout – so if the invite leaked online, Swift and Kelce would know who was responsible.
A source told the publication that the invitations had been sent out around April. They said that the document did not disclose a location for the wedding, and there was no mention of Madison Square Garden on it.

The spokesperson who confirmed that Swift had applied for a permit at MSG said that this requested a crowd size between 500 and 999 people. The permit also asked for a tent and street closures around the venue.
However, the Mamdani administration declined to say who had filed the permit. It has been reported that multiple Kansas City Chiefs players have booked hotel rooms in Manhattan for this weekend.
Earlier this year, Graham Norton said he had “signed so many NDAs” after being invited to Swift’s wedding. He made the comment on his podcast Wanging On, but later clarified that this was “a joke”.
“I said, ‘Oh I’ve signed all these NDAs’, and then it started getting reported as a serious thing in America,” Norton explained (via The Independent). “I didn’t say cut that out because I thought it was so obviously a joke.”

Swift had asked the host to attend the ceremony when she made an appearance on his BBC One chat show last autumn to promote her latest album, ‘The Life Of A Showgirl’. That interview led to Norton bagging a cameo in the video for the single ‘Opalite’. The visuals also starred Domhnall Gleeson, Greta Lee, Jodie Turner-Smith, Lewis Capaldi, and Cillian Murphy – all of whom featured on the same episode of The Graham Norton Show as Swift.
Last September, Foreigner offered their services as the potential wedding band for Swift and Kelce, with Mark Ronson later saying he was “keeping the year open” in the hope of DJing at the event.
Swift herself has hinted that her good friend and former collaborator Ed Sheeran may perform at her wedding, too.
In other news, Swift has revealed that she wrote and recorded her new theme for Toy Story 5 in just eight hours, calling it a “hectic day”. The nostalgic song, titled ‘I Knew It, I Knew You’, soundtracks the closing credits of the Pixar sequel.


The post Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce wedding invites reportedly came with NDAs, ahead of rumoured Madison Square Garden nuptials  appeared first on NME.

Nashik Suicide News : कर्जाचा जाच अन् वसुली एजंटचा मानसिक त्रास;  ट्रॅव्हलचालकाची छळवणुकीला कंटाळून आत्महत्या
description: नाशिक | प्रतिनिधी | Nashik वाहन कर्जाचे हप्ते थकल्याने फायनान्स कंपनीच्या वसुली एजंट आणि गुंडांकडून होणाऱ्या मानसिक छळवणुकीला कंटाळून एका तरूणाने (Youth) टोकाचे पाऊल उचलल्याची घटना समोर आली आहे. आडगाव हद्दीतील जत्रा हॉटेल परिसरात राहणाऱ्या महेश दादासाहेब शिंदे (२७) या खासगी ट्रॅव्हल्सचालकाने कर्जाऊ कारमध्येच विष प्राशन करून आत्महत्या (Suicide) केली. ही घटना सोमवारी (दि. २९) […]
content:
नाशिक | प्रतिनिधी | Nashik



वाहन कर्जाचे हप्ते थकल्याने फायनान्स कंपनीच्या वसुली एजंट आणि गुंडांकडून होणाऱ्या मानसिक छळवणुकीला कंटाळून एका तरूणाने (Youth) टोकाचे पाऊल उचलल्याची घटना समोर आली आहे. आडगाव हद्दीतील जत्रा हॉटेल परिसरात राहणाऱ्या महेश दादासाहेब शिंदे (२७) या खासगी ट्रॅव्हल्सचालकाने कर्जाऊ कारमध्येच विष प्राशन करून आत्महत्या (Suicide) केली. ही घटना सोमवारी (दि. २९) घडली असून खळबळ उडाली आहे.



आडगाव पोलिसांच्या (Aadgaon Police) माहितीनुसार, मृत महेश शिंदे हे मूळचे शिंगवे (ता. नांदगाव, मनमाड परिसर) येथील रहिवासी होते. गेल्या आठ वर्षांपासून ते नाशिकच्या जत्रा हॉटेल परिसरात वास्तव्यास होते आणि ट्रॅव्हल व्यवसाय करत होते. त्यांनी काही वर्षांपूर्वी एका फायनान्स कंपनीकडून वाहन कर्ज घेतले हो-ते. परंतु, कर्जाचे हप्ते थकल्यामुळे संबंधित फायनान्स कंपनीच्या वसुली एजंट आणि गुंडांकडून त्यांचा मानसिक छळ केला जात होता व त्यांना धमक्या दिल्या जात होत्या. या सततच्या छळामुळे मानसिक तणावाखाली आलेल्या महेश यांनी कारमध्येच विष प्राशन केले. विष प्राशन केल्याचे समजताच त्यांना तातडीने उपचारासाठी सह्याद्री रुग्णालयात दाखल करण्यात आले हो ते, मात्र उपचारादरम्यान त्यांची प्राणज्योत मालवली.



या घटनेची माहिती मिळताच रुग्णालय परिसरात (Hospital Area) वाहनचालक युनियनचे पदाधिकारी व चालक जमा झाले. आडगाव पोलिसांनी या प्रकरणी सध्या आकस्मिक मृत्यूची नोंद केली आहे. मृत महेश यांच्या नातलगांनी फायनान्सच्या गुंडांवर मानसिक छळ आणि गंभीर धमक्या दिल्याचा आरोप केला आहे. या प्रकरणाचे गांभीर्य ओळखून पोलिसांनी आता सुसाईड नोटचा शोध सुरू केला आहे. तसेच, मृताच्या कुटुंबाचे सविस्तर जबाब, मोबाइलमधील कॉल हिस्ट्री, संशयास्पद संभाषण आणि चॅटिंगचा कसून तपास केला जात आहे. दोषींवर आत्महत्येस प्रवृत्त केल्याचा गुन्हा नोंदवावा अशी मागणी नातेवाईक आणि वाहनचालक युनियनने केली आहे.

title: Jio IPO: What is Mukesh Ambani’s ‘Project Jupiter’; how Reliance secretly prepared the $4 billion public issue | Timeline details
description: Jio IPO: Code-named Project Jupiter, due to the size and ambitions of the initial public offering (IPO) of Jio Platforms, the initiative was kept so secret that only a small circle of Reliance executives and senior investment bankers knew how the transaction was taking shape.
content: Jio IPO: In August last year, when Mukesh Ambani promised shareholders that Jio Platforms Ltd would go for public listing in the first half of 2026, a massive, highly confidential operation was already underway behind closed doors of Reliance Industries Limited (RIL).Code-named Project Jupiter, due to the size and ambitions of the initial public offering (IPO) of Jio Platforms, the initiative was kept so secret that only a small circle of Reliance executives and senior investment bankers knew how the transaction was taking shape. Draft prospectuses, investor presentations and internal memorandum largely traded physical documents, avoiding digital trails and emails to prevent leaks. And the meetings in this regard we also restricted to highest levels, Bloomberg News reported as said by people familiar with the matter, who did not wish to be identified as discussions were private.Led by senior executives including CFO V. Srikanth, KR Raja, and Jio’s Anshuman Thakur, the hidden mission was tasked with solving three major hurdles behind the closed doors: navigating rigid regulatory rules for initial public offerings, convincing major global investors to sell, and preparing the country’s biggest listing without revealing its structureWhen Ambani took the stage at Reliance's annual annual general meeting nine months later, he announced that Jio was prepared for its public debut.Within hours, the company filed its draft prospectus, with bankers who were fully prepared to file the paperwork instantly.Jio Platforms IPO Timeline The timeline for the Jio IPO unfolded as followsAugust 2025: Mukesh Ambani announced plan to list Jio in first half of 2026September 2025: Sebi relaxed minimum dilution rules for mega IPOs in SeptemberOctober 2025: Reliance brought Kotak and Morgan Stanley on board as bankers in OctoberDecember 2025: Four additional investment banks entered the syndicate in DecemberFebruary 2026: Filing delayed pending notification of revised IPO rules. March 13: The government officially notified the new minimum dilution standards on March 13March 17: Reliance broadened its syndicate to 19 investment banks on March 17March 27: Weak market conditions forced another filing deferral on March 27May: IPO structure shifted from an offer-for-sale (OFS) to a primary issuance in MayJune 19: Reliance finally submitted the draft prospectus for Jio's IPO on June 19  Related News | Rs 64,000-crore IPO question: Can the stock market debut of NSE and Reliance Jio rescue India's retail investors?Project Jupiter was set into motion by Reliance in October. The confidential operation was led by top executives, including Chief Financial Officer V. Srikanth, KR Raja, and Jio executive Anshuman Thakur, the sources noted. Morgan Stanley and Kotak Mahindra Capital Co. were the initial investment banks integrated into the project before the broader syndicate was assembled in December.Representatives for Reliance and Jio chose not to comment, reported Bloomberg News.Even though the banks had commenced operations, their formal appointments were deferred until at least December. This unusual setup allowed advisers to advance the transaction while it was still being structured, according to people familiar with the process.The biggest obstacle for the company involved reaching a consensus with its existing shareholders. Ultimately, Meta Platforms Inc., Alphabet Inc., KKR & Co., and other investors agreed to a pro-rata dilution of roughly 8% of their holdings, which allowed the company to satisfy public float regulations while maintaining their proportional ownership stakes, the sources stated.Concurrently, the regulatory landscape was evolving. In September, India's market regulator lowered the minimum dilution requirement from 5% to 2.5% for companies with valuations exceeding 5 trillion rupees ($53 billion). The government's formal notification of these amendments in March eliminated a major roadblock for the listing.The Jio IPO's financial architecture experienced a significant shift as well. Reliance had initially intended to execute an offer-for-sale (OFS), through which existing backers would divest a 2.8% stake in Jio while the company itself issued no new equity. However, certain investors hesitated at the projected valuation due to a sluggish stock market and the eroding effect of a depreciating rupee on dollar-denominated returns, according to the sources. Meanwhile, the Indian government was actively implementing measures to incentivize foreign capital to stay within the domestic market. In response, Reliance transitioned the IPO into an entirely primary issuance, guaranteeing that the estimated $4 billion in proceeds would flow directly back into the corporation and remain in India. The draft prospectus was officially lodged on June 19, backed by a mandate of 19 financial advisers. The final filing date provided a touch of numerical symmetry noted by insiders, as Ambani’s birthday falls on the 19th of April.

title: Stock Market THIS Month: Nifty ends higher; realty, pharma shine while IT crashes nearly 10% - Check top gainers and biggest losers
description: Indian equity markets delivered mixed sectoral performance this month, with Realty, Pharma and Banking leading gains, while IT, Metal, Energy and FMCG lagged. Nifty rose 1.5%, while Bank Nifty surged 6%.
content: Indian equity markets ended the month with mixed sectoral performance. The Nifty 50 advanced around 1.5 per cent, led by InterGlobe Aviation and Max Healthcare, while the Nifty Bank gained about 6 per cent, with Federal Bank and IDFC First Bank emerging as the top performers.The Nifty Midcap and Nifty Smallcap indices extended their gains for a third consecutive month, with more than 50 per cent of their constituents closing the month in positive territory. The Nifty PSU Bank index also rose around 4 per cent.Among sectoral indices, Nifty Realty climbed more than 6 per cent, driven by Prestige Estates and Phoenix Mills, while the Nifty Pharma index hit a record high and advanced for the third straight month, supported by gains in Ajanta Pharma and IPCA Laboratories.On the downside, Nifty IT was the worst-performing sector, falling around 9.5 per cent and extending losses for a second consecutive month, led by Persistent Systems and Wipro. The Nifty Metal index snapped its two-month winning streak, with Vedanta and NALCO leading the decline. Nifty Energy also ended its two-month winning run, while Nifty FMCG fell for the second consecutive month, weighed down by Patanjali Foods and Tata Consumer Products.Sensex, Nifty at close on June 30The stock markets closed in the red territory for the second consecutive session on Tuesday, June 30, with benchmark indices Sensex and Nifty falling around 0.3 per cent each on the latter’s monthly expiry day.The decline in markets came due to selling in blue-chip IT stocks, oil & gas and select banking shares amid uncertainty over the next round of US-Iran negotiations in Doha. Besides, fresh foreign fund outflows and delayed onset and sluggish progress of the southwest monsoon also weighed on the sentiment of investors.The 30-share BSE Sensex declined 249.70 points, or 0.33 per cent, to settle at 76,478.67, paring its opening gains. During the day, it fell by 398.98 points, or 0.51 per cent, to a low of 76,329.39.The 50-share NSE Nifty dropped 80.50 points, or 0.34 per cent, to end at 23,865.75. This came as India VIX, which measures volatility in the market, plunged slightly to 13.48.Financial Stability ReportIn a separate development, the Reserve Bank of India's Financial Stability Report (FSR) said recurring external shocks could affect both the macroeconomic outlook and domestic financial stability, even as India's macroeconomic fundamentals provide a buffer against external risks.The report noted that the Indian economy remains exposed to energy price shocks and supply chain disruptions, while adding that stress in the domestic financial system is lower than during previous crises. According to the RBI's stress tests, banks' gross non-performing assets (GNPA) are projected at 1.9 per cent by March 2028 under the baseline scenario, while 15 NBFCs could fall below the minimum capital requirements under a severe credit stress scenario.(Disclaimer: The above article is meant for informational purposes only and should not be considered as any investment advice. ET NOW DIGITAL suggests its readers/audience to consult their financial advisors before making any money-related decisions.)

title: PFRDA’s NPS Swasthya to be launched in 60-70 days? Here’s what its chairman S Ramann said
description: PFRDA’s NPS Swasthya Pension Scheme: NPS Swasthya is basically bundling the concept of a dedicated pension account to be paid for medical purposes.  The pension funds will tie up with the insurance companies to provide top-up health insurance.
content: PFRDA’s NPS Swasthya Pension Scheme: Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority (PFRDA) chairman S Ramann today said that the regulator would be launching NPS Swasthya Pension Scheme in the next 60-70 days. What is NPS Swasthya?NPS Swasthya is basically bundling the concept of a dedicated pension account to be paid for medical purposes. There will be a top-up health insurance, which is going to be obtained by the pension fund on behalf of the NPS subscribers, he said at an event of PFRDA here.The pension funds will tie up with the insurance companies to provide top-up health insurance."It was recently approved at the board meeting, and we should be able to roll it out in about 60 to 70 days, because it requires full integration at the back end," he said.Aditya Birla Health Insurance Co Ltd has been roped in as the first service provider and others may join the scheme soon.Initially, it will be launched by a pension fund as a 'proof of concept' in collaboration with Central Recordkeeping Agency and Health Benefit Administrator/Third Party Administrator, the regulator had said in a circular in January, he said.This is open to all categories of NPS subscribers, he added.Fees and charges applicable under the scheme will be governed by the Multiple Scheme Framework (MSF) and shall be disclosed transparently. Such charges will include those payable to the Health Benefit Administrator (HBA).PFRDA launched AI-enabled grievance redressal platformEarlier this month, the PFRDA launched an AI-enabled grievance redressal platform for its subscribers, making pension services more inclusive and accessible.The 'PFRDA Pension Sahayak ' platform integrates multiple pension service touchpoints into a unified digital ecosystem and marks a significant step towards citizen-centric governance and digital transformation in the sector, Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority (PFRDA) said in a statement.The platform supports 22 Indian languages through integration with Bhashini and enables voice-based grievance filing, making pension services more inclusive and accessible, particularly for senior citizens, rural subscribers and users who are more comfortable communicating in regional languages, it said.Subscribers can also receive responses in their preferred language and access audio-based communication, it said.The platform also incorporates an automated escalation mechanism whereby grievances not resolved within prescribed timelines are escalated automatically, enhancing accountability and ensuring timely resolution, it added.The platform combines the principles of accessibility, transparency and accountability envisaged under the Centre's NextGen CPGRAMS with specialized pension-sector workflows, multilingual citizen interaction, integrated grievance handling and AI-enabled supervisory capabilities, it said.(With PTI inputs)

description:
ନୂଆଦିଲ୍ଲୀ, ୩୦/୬: ଟ୍ରେଣ୍ଟ ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ପଦରୁ ଓହରିବାର ସପ୍ତାହକ ପରେ ନୋଏଲ ଟାଟା ଭୋଲଟାସ୍‌ର ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ପଦରୁ ମଧ୍ୟ ଓହରିବା ନେଇ ଆଜି ଘୋଷଣା କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଭୋଲଟାସ୍‌ର ୭୨ତମ ବାର୍ଷିକ ସାଧାରଣ ବୈଠକରେ ଉଦ୍‌ବୋଧନ ଦେବା ସମୟରେ ୬୯ ବର୍ଷୀୟ ନୋଏଲ ଅଂଶଧାରୀମାନଙ୍କୁ କହିଛନ୍ତି ଭୋଲଟାସ୍‌ର ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ଭାବେ ଏହା ତାଙ୍କର ଶେଷ ବୈଠକ।
ଆହୁରି ପଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ- Lose Belly Fat: ପେଟର ଚର୍ବି ହ୍ରାସ ପାଇଁ ଜୀବନଶୈଳୀରେ ସାମିଲ କରନ୍ତୁ ଏହି ଛୋଟ ଅଭ୍ୟାସ
କମ୍ପାନି ନୂଆ ପିଢ଼ିର ନେତୃତ୍ବ ବିକାଶ କରିସାରିଛି
କମ୍ପାନି ନୂଆ ପିଢ଼ିର ନେତୃତ୍ବ ବିକାଶ କରିସାରିଛି ବୋଲି ସେ କହିଥିଲେ। ବର୍ଷ ବର୍ଷ ଧରି କମ୍ପାନିକୁ ସହଯୋଗ କରିଆସିଥିବାରୁ ସେ ଏହି ଅବସରରେ ଅଂଶଧନଧାରୀ, କର୍ମଚାରୀ ଓ ବ୍ୟବସାୟୀ ସହଯୋଗୀମାନଙ୍କୁ ଧନ୍ୟବାଦ ଜଣାଇଥିଲେ। କମ୍ପାନିର ସ୍ଥିତି ଓ ଅଭିବୃଦ୍ଧିକୁ ନେଇ ସେ ଖୁସି ବ୍ୟକ୍ତ କରିଥିଲେ। ୨୦୦୩ ଜାନୁଆରି ୨୭ରେ ନୋଏଲ ଭୋଲଟାସ୍‌‌ ବୋର୍ଡରେ ଯୋଗ ଦେଇଥିଲେ। ୨୦୧୭ ସେପ୍ଟେମ୍ବର ପହିଲାରେ ସେ ଏହାର ଅଣକାର୍ଯ୍ୟନିର୍ବାହୀ ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ହୋଇଥିଲେ। ଗତ ୨୩ ତାରିଖରେ ଟ୍ରେଣ୍ଟର ବୈଠକରେ ଅଂଶଧାରୀମାନଙ୍କୁ ନୋଏଲ ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ପଦରୁ ଓହରୁଥିବା ସଂପର୍କରେ ସୂଚନା ଦେଇଥିଲେ। ଉଲ୍ଲେଖଯୋଗ୍ୟ, ଟାଟା ଟ୍ରଷ୍ଟ୍‌ର ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ଥିବା ନୋଏଲ ଆସନ୍ତା ନଭେମ୍ବରରେ ୭୦ ବର୍ଷରେ ପଦାର୍ପଣ କରିବେ।

title: ୪୫ହଜାର ଟଙ୍କା ଖସିଲାଣି ସୁନାଦର, ଆଗକୁ ଲକ୍ଷେ ତଳକୁ ଖସିବ? ବିଶେଷଜ୍ଞଙ୍କ ବଡ଼ ବୟାନ
description:
ଭୁବନେଶ୍ୱର, ୩୦।୬: ଗତ ପ୍ରାୟ ଏକ ବର୍ଷ ଧରି ସୁନା ବଜାରରେ ଲାଗି ରହିଥିବା ଅପ୍ରତ୍ୟାଶିତ ସୁନାମି ଏବେ ଶାନ୍ତ ପଡ଼ିଛି। ଲଗାତାର ଭାବେ ବୃଦ୍ଧି ପାଇ ଦୁଇଗୁଣାରୁ ଅଧିକ ରେକର୍ଡ କରିଥିବା ସୁନାର ଚମକ ଏବେ ଧୀରେ ଧୀରେ ଫିକା ପଡ଼ିବାରେ ଲାଗିଛି। ବିଶ୍ୱ ବଜାର ସମେତ ଭାରତୀୟ ବଜାରରେ ସୁନା ଦର କ୍ରମାଗତ ଭାବେ ହ୍ରାସ ପାଉଥିବାରୁ ଗ୍ରାହକ ଏବଂ ନିବେଶକଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଏବେ ଏହାକୁ ନେଇ ବଡ଼ ଚର୍ଚ୍ଚା ଆରମ୍ଭ ହୋଇଯାଇଛି। ବଜାର […]
The post ୪୫ହଜାର ଟଙ୍କା ଖସିଲାଣି ସୁନାଦର, ଆଗକୁ ଲକ୍ଷେ ତଳକୁ ଖସିବ? ବିଶେଷଜ୍ଞଙ୍କ ବଡ଼ ବୟାନ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ଭୁବନେଶ୍ୱର, ୩୦।୬: ଗତ ପ୍ରାୟ ଏକ ବର୍ଷ ଧରି ସୁନା ବଜାରରେ ଲାଗି ରହିଥିବା ଅପ୍ରତ୍ୟାଶିତ ସୁନାମି ଏବେ ଶାନ୍ତ ପଡ଼ିଛି। ଲଗାତାର ଭାବେ ବୃଦ୍ଧି ପାଇ ଦୁଇଗୁଣାରୁ ଅଧିକ ରେକର୍ଡ କରିଥିବା ସୁନାର ଚମକ ଏବେ ଧୀରେ ଧୀରେ ଫିକା ପଡ଼ିବାରେ ଲାଗିଛି। ବିଶ୍ୱ ବଜାର ସମେତ ଭାରତୀୟ ବଜାରରେ ସୁନା ଦର କ୍ରମାଗତ ଭାବେ ହ୍ରାସ ପାଉଥିବାରୁ ଗ୍ରାହକ ଏବଂ ନିବେଶକଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଏବେ ଏହାକୁ ନେଇ ବଡ଼ ଚର୍ଚ୍ଚା ଆରମ୍ଭ ହୋଇଯାଇଛି।
ବଜାର ତଥ୍ୟ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଚଳିତ ବର୍ଷ ଆରମ୍ଭରେ ସୁନା ଦର ସମସ୍ତ ରେକର୍ଡ ଭାଙ୍ଗି ପ୍ରତି ୧୦ ଗ୍ରାମ ପିଛା ପ୍ରାୟ ୧ ଲକ୍ଷ ୮୫ ହଜାର ଟଙ୍କା ସ୍ତରରେ ପହଞ୍ଚି ଯାଇଥିଲା। କିନ୍ତୁ ମଲ୍ଟି କମୋଡିଟି ଏକ୍ସଚେଞ୍ଜ (MCX) ରେ ଏବେ ସୁନା ଦର ନିଜର ସର୍ବୋଚ୍ଚ ସ୍ତରରୁ ପ୍ରାୟ ୪୫,୦୦୦ ଟଙ୍କା ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ତଳକୁ ଖସି ଆସିଲାଣି। ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ ବଜାରରେ ଏହା ପ୍ରାୟ ୧ ଲକ୍ଷ ୪୦ ହଜାର ଟଙ୍କା ପାଖାପାଖି କାରବାର କରୁଛି। କେବଳ ଚଳିତ ଜୁନ୍ ମାସରେ ହିଁ ସୁନା ଦରରେ ୧୦ ଗ୍ରାମ ପିଛା ପ୍ରାୟ ୧୫,୦୦୦ ଟଙ୍କାର ବଡ଼ ହ୍ରାସ ରେକର୍ଡ କରାଯାଇଛି। ପାଣିପାଗ ଏବଂ ଆର୍ଥିକ ସ୍ଥିତିକୁ ଦେଖି ଅନୁମାନ କରାଯାଉଛି ଯେ ଆଗକୁ ଏହି ଦାମ୍ ଆହୁରି ଖସି ପ୍ରାୟ ୧ ଲକ୍ଷ ଟଙ୍କା ତଳକୁ ମଧ୍ୟ ଯାଇପାରେ।
କାହିଁକି କମୁଛି ସୁନା ଦର?
୧. ମଜବୁତ ଆମେରିକୀୟ ଡଲାର ଓ ସୁଧ ହାର: ବିଶ୍ୱ ବଜାରରେ ଆମେରିକୀୟ ଡଲାର କ୍ରମାଗତ ଭାବେ ଶକ୍ତିଶାଳୀ ହେଉଛି। ଏହା ସହିତ ଆମେରିକାର ‘ଫେଡେରାଲ୍ ରିଜର୍ଭ’ ପକ୍ଷରୁ କଠୋର ସୁଧ ହାର ନୀତି ଆପଣାଯାଇଥିବାରୁ ନିବେଶକମାନେ ସୁନା ବଦଳରେ ଅନ୍ୟ ସୁରକ୍ଷିତ ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ନିବେଶ କରୁଛନ୍ତି, ଯାହା ସୁନା ଦାମ୍ ଉପରେ ଚାପ ପକାଇଛି।
୨. ବିଶ୍ୱ ରାଜନୀତିରେ ସ୍ଥିରତା: ଗତ କିଛି ମାସ ଧରି ଚାଲିଥିବା ଭୂ-ରାଜନୈତିକ ଉତ୍ତେଜନା (Geopolitical Tensions) କିଛିଟା କମିବା ପରେ, ସୁରକ୍ଷିତ ନିବେଶ ଭାବେ ସୁନା ପ୍ରତି ଥିବା ବିଶ୍ୱସ୍ତରୀୟ ଚାହିଦା ହ୍ରାସ ପାଇଛି।
୩. ବିବାହ ଋତୁର ଅଭାବ: ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ବଜାରରେ ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ କୌଣସି ବଡ଼ ବିବାହ କିମ୍ବା ମାଙ୍ଗଳିକ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ ନଥିବାରୁ ଘରୋଇ ସ୍ତରରେ ସୁନା ଗହଣାର ଚାହିଦା କମ୍ ରହିଛି।
ସୁନା ଦର ଆଗକୁ ଆହୁରି କମିଯାଇପାରେ ବୋଲି ଆଶଙ୍କା କରି ଗ୍ରାହକମାନଙ୍କ ମାନସିକତାରେ ଏକ ବଡ଼ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନ ଦେଖିବାକୁ ମିଳିଛି। ବହୁ ସଂଖ୍ୟାରେ ଲୋକେ ଭାବୁଛନ୍ତି ଯେ ଦାମ୍ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ କମିବା ପୂର୍ବରୁ ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ ପୁରୁଣା ଅଳଙ୍କାର ବିକ୍ରି କରିଦେଲେ ଭଲ ଲାଭ ମିଳିବ।

ଇଣ୍ଡିଆ ବୁଲିଅନ୍ ଆଣ୍ଡ ଜୁଏଲର୍ସ ଆସୋସିଏସନ୍ (IBJA) ର ତଥ୍ୟ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଗତ ଏପ୍ରିଲ୍‌ରୁ ଜୁନ୍‌ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଭାରତୀୟ ବଜାରରେ ପ୍ରାୟ ୫୦ ଟନ୍ ସୁନା ଗ୍ରାହକଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା ବିକ୍ରି କରାଯାଇଛି। ଗତ ବର୍ଷର ଏହି ସମୟ ତୁଳନାରେ ଏହା ପ୍ରାୟ ୪୩ ପ୍ରତିଶତ ଅଧିକ ଅଟେ।



ଆଗକୁ ବଢ଼ିବ କିଣାବିକା: ଗହଣା ବ୍ୟବସାୟୀଙ୍କ ମତରେ, ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ ଦର କମୁଥିଲେ ମଧ୍ୟ ଆଗକୁ ପର୍ବପର୍ବାଣୀ ଏବଂ ବିବାହ ସିଜନ୍ ଆସୁଥିବାରୁ ଗ୍ରାହକମାନେ କମ୍ ଦାମ୍‌ରେ ସୁନା କିଣିବାକୁ ପୁଣି ବଜାରକୁ ଫେରିବେ, ଯାହାଦ୍ୱାରା ବଜାରରେ ଚଳଚଞ୍ଚଳତା ବଢ଼ିବ।


ତରବର ହୁଅନ୍ତୁ ନାହିଁ: ଆର୍ଥିକ ସମୀକ୍ଷକଙ୍କ କହିବା କଥା, ଭାରତୀୟଙ୍କ ପାଇଁ ସୁନା କେବଳ ଅଳଙ୍କାର ନୁହେଁ ବରଂ ଏକ ସୁରକ୍ଷିତ ସମ୍ପତ୍ତି। ତେଣୁ ସ୍ୱଳ୍ପକାଳୀନ ଦର ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନକୁ ଦେଖି ଭୟଭୀତ ହୋଇ କିମ୍ବା ତରବର ହୋଇ ନିଜର ସୁନା ବିକ୍ରି କରନ୍ତୁ ନାହିଁ।


ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟକ୍ରମେ ନିବେଶ (SIP Mode): ଯେଉଁମାନେ ଦୀର୍ଘମିଆଦି (Long-term) ନିବେଶ ପାଇଁ ସୁନା କିଣିବାକୁ ଚାହୁଁଛନ୍ତି, ସେମାନେ ଏକାଥରେ ବଡ଼ ପରିମାଣର ଟଙ୍କା ନ ଲଗାଇ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟକ୍ରମେ (ଧୀରେ ଧୀରେ) କିଣିବା ଉଚିତ। ଏହାଦ୍ୱାରା ବଜାରର ଉତ୍ଥାନ-ପତନର ପ୍ରଭାବ କମ୍ ପଡ଼ିଥାଏ ଏବଂ ନିବେଶ ସୁରକ୍ଷିତ ରହେ।



The post ୪୫ହଜାର ଟଙ୍କା ଖସିଲାଣି ସୁନାଦର, ଆଗକୁ ଲକ୍ଷେ ତଳକୁ ଖସିବ? ବିଶେଷଜ୍ଞଙ୍କ ବଡ଼ ବୟାନ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: Alia reveals Samay had her laughing so much that even her smartwatch got confused

title: PM Modi Chairs High-Level Meet With Top Bureaucrats | Details Awaited
description: PM Modi led a significant meeting with secretaries of central ministries to discuss policy reforms in the country.
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Tuesday chaired a high-level meeting with the secretaries of central ministries. While the details of the discussions are not yet known, it was expected that PM Modi, during the meeting, would touch upon topics related to policy reforms and improve the ease of doing business.It was learnt that the secretaries will make presentations on their respective ministries, giving details on the functioning as well as on the progress made on various reform measures and other people-centric steps during the high-level meeting. Notably, PM Modi has already set the government's goal of turning India into a developed country by 2047, when it celebrates 100 years of its independence. The Prime Minister also reportedly was set to review with the secretaries the next-generation reforms through which the government wants to make people's lives more comfortable and ensure ease of doing business.He was expected to advise the secretaries to remain focused on governance and delivery, and ensure that there is no pendency in government work, especially people-centric initiatives.PM Modi had earlier outlined the reform priorities for the next 10 years, asserting that his government's "Reform Express" has delivered systemic transformation and benefited citizens in a significant way.India's GDP Growth Rate Of 7.7% In 2025-26India's economy expanded by 7.8 per cent in the January-March quarter, exceeding forecasts on strong domestic demand and government expenditure. The GDP growth was compared with a 7 per cent expansion a year ago. The full-year growth accelerated to 7.7 per cent from 7.1 per cent in FY25, supported by healthy consumption and robust investment activity.At a meeting of the council of ministers on June 21, PM Modi had said the government shall leave no stone unturned to further "Ease of Living", "Ease of Doing Business" and increase opportunities for youngsters.(With agency inputs)

title: ‘ഞങ്ങൾ പാകിസ്താന്റെ ഭാഗമല്ല, വേറെ വഴി നോക്കാനറിയാം’; പാക് അധീന കശ്മീരിൽ പ്രക്ഷോഭം കടുക്കുന്നു
After Trent, Noel Tata steps down from Voltas; addressed last AGM as Chairman
description: Noel Tata said the company has developed its next generation of leaders through internal promotions and lateral hiring, and has expressed confidence in the management's ability to drive future growth.
content: Almost a week after stepping down as Chairman of Trent, Noel Tata on Tuesday has announced that he would also relinquish the chairmanship of Voltas. Addressing shareholders at the company’s 72nd Annual General Meeting, the 69-year-old said this would be his last AGM as Chairman of the leading air-conditioning company.What did Noel Tata say?Noel Tata said in his address to shareholders, "As you might be aware, this will be my last annual general meeting as Chairman."He said the company has developed its next generation of leaders through internal promotions and lateral hiring, and has expressed confidence in the management's ability to drive future growth."The company has developed our next generation of leaders, from both in-house promotions and lateral hires. I am confident that with the close cooperation of seasoned practitioners and new talent, your company will continue to take big strides in all business segments," he said.Thanking shareholders, employees and business partners for their support over the years, Tata said he was satisfied with the company's current position and growth trajectory."I would like to sincerely thank all our shareholders, colleagues and partners for your trust, understanding and constant support over the years," he said.Voltas gets new Chairman after 7-year tenureNoel Tata had joined the board of Voltas on January 27, 2003. He was appointed as the non-executive chairman of Voltas on September 1, 2017, succeeding the outgoing chairman, Ishaat Hussain.Earlier this month, on June 23, Noel Tata, while addressing shareholders of Trent, a leading Indian fashion and lifestyle retailer, had made a similar announcement.Noel Tata, who is also Chairman of Tata Trusts, the largest shareholder of Tata Sons, will turn 70 in November this year.The Companies Act 2013 mandates that any Managing Director or Whole-Time Director cannot be appointed or continue employment if they are 70 years of age or older.Highlighting the company's recent performance, Tata, in his address, said Voltas entered the current financial year on a strong footing, with its room air-conditioner business achieving a significant milestone."I have great satisfaction that Voltas stands strong today, having entered the new financial year on a strong note. Our room air conditioning business crossed the milestone of 1 million units in a record 81 days, reaffirming its undisputed market leadership," he said. Noel has been associated with the Tata group for 40 years.He currently serves as the Non-Executive Chairman of the Board of Directors of Trent, Tata Investment Corporation, Tata International, Trent Hypermarket and Tata International West Asia DMCC, Dubai, UAE.Besides, he is also the Vice- Chairman of Tata Steel and Titan Company Ltd.With agency inputs

मुंबई में स्कूल बस पर गिरा पेड़, 1 छात्र की मौत; 10 से ज्यादा बच्चे घायल
description:
Tree falls on school bus in Mumbai: मुंबई में मंगलवार दोपहर एक दर्दनाक हादसा हो गया। चेंबूर इलाके में बच्चों को लेकर जा रही एक स्कूल बस पर अचानक एक बड़ा पेड़ गिर गया। हादसे में एक छात्र की मौत हो गई, जबकि 10 से ज्यादा बच्चे घायल हो गए। घायलों में कुछ बच्चों की.
The post मुंबई में स्कूल बस पर गिरा पेड़, 1 छात्र की मौत; 10 से ज्यादा बच्चे घायल appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.
content:
Tree falls on school bus in Mumbai: मुंबई में मंगलवार दोपहर एक दर्दनाक हादसा हो गया। चेंबूर इलाके में बच्चों को लेकर जा रही एक स्कूल बस पर अचानक एक बड़ा पेड़ गिर गया। हादसे में एक छात्र की मौत हो गई, जबकि 10 से ज्यादा बच्चे घायल हो गए। घायलों में कुछ बच्चों की हालत गंभीर बताई जा रही है।
दोपहर करीब 2:50 बजे हुआ हादसा 
जानकारी के मुताबिक, यह हादसा दोपहर करीब 2:50 बजे हुआ। तिलकनगर स्थित यूनिवर्सल स्कूल की बस चेंबूर के 11 नंबर रोड से गुजर रही थी। तभी अचानक सड़क किनारे खड़ा एक बड़ा पेड़ बस पर गिर पड़ा। हादसे के समय बस में कई स्कूली बच्चे सवार थे।
मौके पर अफरा-तफरी
पेड़ गिरते ही मौके पर अफरा-तफरी मच गई। स्थानीय लोगों और बचाव दल ने तुरंत राहत कार्य शुरू किया और सभी बच्चों को बस से सुरक्षित बाहर निकाला। हालांकि, एक छात्र पेड़ की चपेट में आ गया, जिससे उसकी मौत हो गई। हादसे में घायल हुए 10 से ज्यादा बच्चों में से 4 छात्रों को जेन अस्पताल में भर्ती कराया गया है। बाकी बच्चों का भी इलाज किया जा रहा है।
खतरनाक पेड़ों की छंटाई या उन्हें हटाने की मांग की थी
स्थानीय लोगों का कहना है कि उन्होंने पहले भी कई बार बीएमसी (बृहन्मुंबई महानगरपालिका) को पत्र लिखकर इलाके में पुराने और खतरनाक पेड़ों की छंटाई या उन्हें हटाने की मांग की थी। उनका आरोप है कि पहले भी इस तरह की घटनाएं हो चुकी हैं, लेकिन कई शिकायतों के बावजूद कोई कार्रवाई नहीं की गई। फिलहाल प्रशासन पूरे मामले की जांच कर रहा है और हादसे के कारणों का पता लगाया जा रहा है।
The post मुंबई में स्कूल बस पर गिरा पेड़, 1 छात्र की मौत; 10 से ज्यादा बच्चे घायल appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.
